# Inline code completion

<!-- source: 05-github-copilot.qmd, section "1. Code completion" -->

Your first taste of AI-assisted coding: tab-complete suggestions as you type, tried out on the benthic reef data.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge referencing `pres.topa`/`CB_cover` inline-completion behaviour.
:::
